name: ocr-deepseek-translator
description: Cloudflare Pages frontend + standalone Worker backend for DeepSeek OCR translation

scripts.worker:wf:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute wf-db --config wrangler.worker.toml --remote --file worker-backend/migrations/001_wf.sql
scripts.worker:wf:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute wf-db --config wrangler.worker.toml --local --file worker-backend/migrations/001_wf.sql
